text:
Grisha Yeager is the father of Eren Yeager and husband of Carla Yeager.

Appearance

Grisha has shaggy black hair which he keeps neatly combed and parted in the middle. He has a light mustache and also wears a pair of glasses along with a light-colored shirt.

Personality

Grisha appears as a caring adult man.
